div.span:
Performance optimization trust
Between child domains

Same techniques as parent-child:
SID History injection

Transitive trust between forests
Requires SID filtering bypass

SID filtering enabled by default:
Blocks extra SID attributes

Historical vuln:
SID History injection works

Add target forest
Enterprise Admins SID

Limited to explicit permissions
No SID History abuse

Enumerate selective auth:
Find accounts with access

Compromise those specific accounts
Limited cross-forest access

Enumerate users/groups
with access across trust

Extract trust key:
lsadump::trust /patch
or lsadump::lsa /patch

Request TGS from target:
Using forged inter-realm ticket

Result: Access to resources
in trusted domain

Forge Inter-Realm TGT
with Enterprise Admins SID

SID History injection:
Add S-1-5-21-...-519
Enterprise Admins RID

Access parent domain DCs
Full forest compromise

Result: Forest root control
from child domain

BloodHound:
Shortest path to Domain/EA
across trust boundaries

Golden Ticket across trust:
Forge TGT with target domain SID

SID History abuse:
Inject privileged group SIDs

Kerberoasting across trust:
Request service tickets
from trusted domain

Unconstrained delegation:
Capture TGTs from trusted users

Printer bug + unconstrained delegation:
Force DC authentication

Create backdoor accounts
in both forests

DETECTION & PREVENTION:
Enable SID filtering: netdom trust /quarantine:yes
Monitor Event 4768-4769: Inter-realm TGT/TGS with unusual SID
Audit trust relationships - Minimize external trusts
Selective authentication - Limit cross-boundary auth
PAM Trust alternative for privileged access management

EXPLOITATION TOOLS:
mimikatz: lsadump::trust - kerberos::golden /ticket
Rubeus: asktgt asktgs with /domain parameter
PowerView: Get-DomainTrust Get-DomainForeignUser/Group
Impacket: ticketer.py getTGT.py with trust keys
